column.name: Emp_Id
column.description: Unique identifier for the employee/sales resource in the master data; often used to join HR/roster records to performance and coverage metrics. Can also represent a placeholder like a vacant position when paired with an "Emp_Name" such as "vacant HQ".

column.name: PositionCode
column.description: Identifier for the position in the sales hierarchy (often same as Emp_Id in this data), used for mapping roles/territories and reporting structure. Analysts should treat it as a position key rather than a person key when vacancies or transfers exist.

column.name: Zone
column.description: Top-level geographic business zone for the employee/position (e.g., West, North). Used for regional rollups and zone-wise performance reporting.

column.name: State
column.description: State/region within the zone where the employee/position is assigned (e.g., Gujarat). Useful for state-level coverage and sales aggregation.

column.name: City
column.description: Primary city associated with the employee/position assignment (e.g., Ahmedabad). Typically used for location-based filters and operational reporting.

column.name: User_Id
column.description: System login/user identifier linked to the employee for sales apps or SFA/DMS systems; may be numeric and reused across records. Use this to connect to transactional system users when Emp_Id is not present there.

column.name: Emp_Name
column.description: Display name of the employee or the position label; may contain placeholders such as "vacant HQ -..." indicating an unfilled role. Analysts should not assume it always corresponds to an actual person.

column.name: Designation
column.description: Role/designation of the employee/position in the sales organization (e.g., TSI). Useful for slicing KPIs by role level.

column.name: Email_Address
column.description: Registered email for the employee in the master; can be null or the literal string "null" when not captured. Not reliable as a unique key due to missing values.

column.name: Phone
column.description: Primary contact number for the employee/user; may be stored as text and can duplicate User_Id in some cases. Treat as contact metadata, not a stable identifier.

column.name: Team_Leader_Id
column.description: Employee/position identifier of the reporting manager/team leader for this employee. Used to build reporting hierarchies and manager-wise rollups.

column.name: Division
column.description: Business division or sales channel classification (e.g., Retail). Use this to separate performance across divisions with different targets or product focus.

column.name: CreationDate
column.description: Timestamp when the employee/position record was created in the master system. Helpful for auditing and identifying newly added roles or backfilled master data.

column.name: CreateBy
column.description: Name/role of the user who created the master record (e.g., Z Admin). Used for audit trails and data stewardship analysis.

column.name: TeamLeader
column.description: Name of the team leader/manager mapped to the employee/position. Useful for readable reporting, but use Team_Leader_Id for joins.

column.name: TLDesignation
column.description: Designation/role of the team leader (e.g., SFA). Helps interpret hierarchy level and managerial span by role.

column.name: TLPhone
column.description: Contact number for the team leader; may appear as numeric with decimals due to formatting (e.g., "9889101551.0"). Treat as text and clean before use.

column.name: TLDepartment
column.description: Department of the team leader (commonly Sales). Used to validate organizational ownership and filter non-sales managers if present.

column.name: HeadQuarters
column.description: Declared headquarters location for the employee/position; may be null or not maintained. When populated, use for HQ-based territory planning and reporting.

column.name: WorkingArea
column.description: Operational working area/territory for the employee (e.g., Ahmedabad). Often more relevant than City for field coverage analysis.

column.name: DeActiveDate
column.description: Date when the employee/position was deactivated/closed in the master; null indicates active. Use to exclude inactive roles from current-period headcount and performance attribution.

column.name: DeActiveBy
column.description: User/name who deactivated the record, supporting audit and workflow tracing. Typically null unless the record is deactivated.

column.name: TotalBeat
column.description: Count of beats/routes assigned to the employee/position, typically an integer stored as text. Used as a coverage capacity indicator for field force planning.

column.name: TotalClient
column.description: Total number of clients/outlets mapped to the employee/position, often used to measure coverage load. Usually numeric but may be stored as text.

column.name: TotalShared
column.description: Number of clients/outlets shared with other users/positions, indicating overlap in responsibility. Useful for analyzing shared coverage and potential duplication.

column.name: Emp Code
column.description: Alternate employee code (often HR/payroll code) distinct from Emp_Id; may be missing. Use when integrating with HR systems that do not use Emp_Id.

column.name: Client_Id
column.description: Client/outlet identifier when the master is exploded/mapped to client-level assignments; null indicates the row is not at client granularity. Use cautiously because this table may mix roster and performance grains.

column.name: ..SSE Name
column.description: Name of the SSE level in the hierarchy for this record; appears as a hierarchy attribute and may be null. Use for higher-level rollups when hierarchy is denormalized into the row.

column.name: .SO/SR/SE/TSI/TSO/SRTSI Name
column.description: Name of the field sales role (SO/SR/SE/TSI/TSO/SRTSI) in the hierarchy, provided as a denormalized label. Useful for display, but prefer Emp_Id/PositionCode for joining and deduping.

column.name: ASM/BDM/TSM Name
column.description: Area/Business/Team Sales Manager name in the reporting chain, used for managerial rollups. Typically a denormalized hierarchy field and may be null in some extracts.

column.name: RSM Name
column.description: Regional Sales Manager name for the hierarchy rollup. Use for region-level performance summaries when IDs are not available.

column.name: Joinining_Date
column.description: Employee joining date (note spelling), indicating when the person started; may be null for vacant positions or missing HR sync. Helpful for tenure analysis and ramp-up performance studies.

column.name: Department
column.description: Department of the employee/position (e.g., Sales). Use to filter out non-sales records if the table includes multiple functions.

column.name: EPID
column.description: External/person identifier from another system (often enterprise/HR ID); may be null. Use as a cross-system mapping key when available.

column.name: RQID
column.description: Request/role queue or system-specific routing ID used in workflows/approvals; commonly numeric with 0 meaning not configured. Analysts typically use it only for operational/process reporting.

column.name: CanApprove
column.description: Flag (0/1) indicating whether the user/position has approval rights in the system. Useful for workflow controls and to separate approvers from non-approvers in audit analyses.

column.name: UUID
column.description: Composite unique identifier built from Emp_Id, Emp_Name, and User_Id in this dataset. Use as a row-level surrogate key when source keys are not unique across time or extracts.

column.name: Order_Date
column.description: Transaction/order date associated with the performance measures on the row; indicates the day for which KPIs like TC/PC/NSV are recorded. This implies the table includes daily facts joined to employee master attributes.

column.name: TC
column.description: Total Calls (or total customer contacts) for the given Order_Date and employee/position; typically numeric and may be 0. Used as an activity volume KPI.

column.name: PC
column.description: Productive Calls (calls resulting in an order) for the day; usually <= TC. Used to calculate productivity ratios such as PC/TC.

column.name: P3_NSV
column.description: Net Sales Value for P3 category/priority products for the day; stored as numeric text. Analysts should confirm P3 definition in the commercial taxonomy before comparing across divisions.

column.name: P3_Val
column.description: Gross/total value for P3 category sales for the day, potentially before certain deductions compared to NSV. Use together with P3_NSV to analyze discounting or value realization.

column.name: TLSD
column.description: Trade/total line scheme discount or a similar discount metric at the transaction aggregate level for the day; often 0 when no discount applies. Interpret as a monetary value unless business definitions state otherwise.

column.name: ULSD
column.description: Additional discount metric (often an upper-level/unique line scheme discount) aggregated for the day. Use with TLSD to understand total discount impact on value/NSV.

column.name: P2_Val
column.description: Gross/total value for P2 category sales for the day. Commonly used alongside P2_NSV and P2_QTY for mix and growth analysis.

column.name: P2_NSV
column.description: Net Sales Value for P2 category/priority products for the day. Useful for performance tracking where P2 is a strategic product bucket.

column.name: P2_QTY
column.description: Quantity sold for P2 category for the day (units or packs depending on source). Use for volume-based productivity and price/mix decomposition with P2_Val/NSV.

column.name: BusinessMonth
column.description: Business month in YYYY-MM format used for period grouping; may follow a fiscal calendar aligned to sales reporting. Use this for monthly aggregation rather than deriving month from Order_Date when business calendars differ.

column.name: ECO
column.description: ECO metric for the day (commonly Effective/End Customer Orders or a similar operational KPI); numeric and may be 0. Validate business definition before using as an order count.

column.name: MTD_P3_Val
column.description: Month-to-date cumulative P3 value up to and including Order_Date for the employee/position. Use to track progress vs targets without recomputing cumulative sums when trusted.

column.name: MTD_P3_NSV
column.description: Month-to-date cumulative P3 net sales value up to Order_Date. Analysts should ensure MTD fields reset correctly at BusinessMonth boundaries.

column.name: MTD_P2_Val
column.description: Month-to-date cumulative P2 value up to Order_Date. Useful for MTD dashboards and pacing analysis.

column.name: MTD_P2_NSV
column.description: Month-to-date cumulative P2 net sales value up to Order_Date. Use for MTD comparisons across roles and territories.

column.name: MTD_PC
column.description: Month-to-date cumulative productive calls up to Order_Date. Supports pacing and activity tracking without daily aggregation.

column.name: MTD_ECO
column.description: Month-to-date cumulative ECO up to Order_Date. Use for operational pacing metrics at month level.

column.name: DMS_Sales_Value
column.description: Sales value captured from the DMS (Distributor Management System) for the corresponding date/period; may be null when DMS integration is missing. Use to reconcile SFA order value vs DMS billed/secondary sales where applicable.

column.name: DMS_Qty
column.description: Quantity captured from DMS for the corresponding date/period; may be null. Used for reconciliation and secondary sales volume tracking alongside DMS_Sales_Value.
